scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm -r build --filter web --filter apis
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter apis exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:reset: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter apis exec prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.db:seed: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter apis exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:studio: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter apis exec prisma studio
